author: doll-agent
content: Added tests/api_proof.rs with 12 integration tests exercising every public API: api_proof_decision_tree, extra_tree, random_forest, extra_trees_ensemble, gradient_boosting, hist_gradient_boosting, adaboost (SAMME + SAMME.R + AdaBoostRegressor with all 3 AdaBoostLoss variants), bagging, voting, isolation_forest, random_trees_embedding, f32_compiles. Per-estimator coverage includes builder chains, fit, predict, predict_proba (cls), predict_log_proba (cls), score, decision_function (boosting cls), feature_importances_, classes/n_classes. All 12 pass. Final ferrolearn-tree test count: 355 (310 unit + 12 api_proof + 7 oracle + 5 proptest + 7 sklearn_equiv + 14 doctest).
